lines.speaker: Jofridr Mordstatter
lines.text: Hello there. Would you like to see the goods I have for sale?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do you have so much wool in your store? I haven't seen any sheep anywhere.

lines.speaker: Jofridr Mordstatter
lines.text: Ah, I have contacts on the mainland. I have a sailor friend who brings me crates of wool on a regular basis.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you trade for it?

lines.speaker: Jofridr Mordstatter
lines.text: Rope of course! What else can we sell? Fish would go off before it got so far south.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where does all this rope go?

lines.speaker: Jofridr Mordstatter
lines.text: Err, I don't remember the name of the place very well. Dreinna? Drennor? Something like that.

lines.speaker: Jofridr Mordstatter
lines.text: Would you like to see the goods I have for sale?
